verse_text: 'This is the covenant that I will make with them after those days, says the LORD: I will put My laws into their hearts, and in their minds I will write them,'

links.context: The implanting of the new covenant, the law in the heart, was clearly effected with the coming of Christ ([[2CO.3:3]]; [[HEB.10:15]]-18).
The Giver of the Law of Moses will soon become incarnate, writing His laws on our hearts and minds and remembering our sins and lawless deeds no more ([[HEB.10:16]], [[HEB.10:17]]).
